label: offensive
rationale: Personal question 'nimerukwa na akili' with profanity, no group targeting.

label: offensive
rationale: 'Empty head... Bitter with losses' - personal insult to an individual.

label: offensive
rationale: 'nitatingisa matiti' - sexual crudeness, no protected characteristic.

rationale: 'The knife that missed the artery won't miss the heart' - personal threat plus 'd. Head' insult.

label: offensive
rationale: 'world's worst journalist', 'dozy mare', 'Thick Dick' - personal abuse of individual journalist.

rationale: 'Leo utalia na kunyamba' - political taunt directed at named politicians.

label: offensive
rationale: 'mpumbavu wa mwisho', 'majambazi', 'magenge ya wahuni' - abuse directed at demonstrators generally, not religious group.

rationale: 'That tribal man is very evil' - calling Rigathi tribalist and evil as individual characteristics.

rationale: 'Kalonzo hana hata full support ya kambas' - ethnic-bloc political analysis, no contempt.

label: neither
rationale: 'Advice Kambas to do the same' - ethnic-bloc electoral talk without attack.

label: hate
rationale: 'vast majority of the Ol-Kalou people are not intelligent', 'aren't they all Chokoras' - collective attribution of stupidity and dehumanizing term to regional/ethnic group.

label: hate
rationale: 'peleka ukisii Yako huko' - ethnic-based exclusion telling person to go back to their ethnic region.

rationale: 'two moles in kenyas opposition' - calling named individuals traitors.

rationale: 'foreigners like Dwale, Hajji and Amin' - othering based on Muslim/Somali names, denying belonging.

label: hate
rationale: 'hizo Mbwa za coast' - dehumanizing coastal people as dogs.

rationale: 'MauMau did not die for Kenyans to become slaves' - political rhetoric without group attack.

label: neither
rationale: 'High Court rejects petition to legalise bhang' - news reporting.

rationale: 'Only an idiots ndio they follow a mediocre party leader' - insulting party supporters without clear ethnic transfer.

label: neither
rationale: 'Ruto, even with his billions and militia, will go home in 2027' - robust political criticism with ballot remedy.

label: neither
rationale: 'Israel is the most hated nation' - about Israel/US politics, not Kenyan context.

rationale: 'Kwa nini ni wakamba ndio wanapush hii hashtag' - ethnic-bloc political observation without contempt.
